description:
From /critical-review of specled_-csg, consensus finding F4 [Medium; idioms+simplicity]. The git/3, temp_path, random_hex etc. helper kit is copy-pasted across Evidence.Sync, Evidence.TreeHash, Evidence.Store, and the migrate task, with variants already diverging. Extract one shared SpecLedEx.Evidence.Git (or reuse an existing repo git helper) so behavior fixes land once.
Files: lib/specled_ex/evidence/{sync,tree_hash,store}.ex, lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.migrate.ex.
Full report: /Users/mz/vaults/rmbrs-vault/code_review/critical/specled_ex/2026-07-22/specled_-csg-evidence-ledger-split/20260722-062318-consolidated.md

comments.text:
ADMISSION SCOPE (orchestrator, run-2 W1)
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/sync.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/git.ex (new shared helper module; name may vary within lib/specled_ex/evidence/)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.migrate.ex
- test/specled_ex/evidence/** (tests for the extracted helper + fallout)
- test/mix/tasks/** (migrate task test fallout only)
- .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md (verification stubs / guard-satisfying co-update only)
Out of scope (intent): no behavior changes beyond consolidating the duplicated git/temp-path/random-hex helpers onto one module; F2/F5/F6 fixes belong to specled_-7vy/43y/7xz. Any file outside these globs must be disclosed in IMPLEMENTED.

IMPLEMENTED
Session: specled_-csg-evidence-ledger-split - implement (specled_-737)
Log: n/a (no session log path supplied by orchestrator)

Commit: 59454d7111255998f5c5d4cd266c54a720006e0c
Files touched: lib/specled_ex/evidence/git.ex (new), lib/specled_ex/evidence/sync.ex, lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex, lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex, lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.migrate.ex, .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md (surface list co-update only)
Tests added: none — pure structural refactor, all four modules' existing behavior preserved byte-for-byte; existing suites cover the extracted paths
Verification stubs flipped: none — all evidence_store.spec.md verification stubs were already execute: true
Verification tier: change-scoped — mix test test/specled_ex/evidence/sync_test.exs test/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash_test.exs test/specled_ex/evidence/store_test.exs test/mix/tasks/spec_evidence_migrate_test.exs test/mix/tasks/spec_sync_task_test.exs test/mix/tasks/spec_prune_task_test.exs (15 tests, 0 failures), plus mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix format --check-formatted (touched files + repo-wide), mix spec.check --no-run-commands (status=pass, errors=0, warnings=0); full-system proof deferred to the merge gate / PR CI
Final-tier runs: 1

Summary: Extracted SpecLedEx.Evidence.Git as the single shared module for the git/3 subprocess wrapper, temp-path allocation under .git/specled-tmp, and random-hex generation that had drifted into three slightly different shapes across Sync, TreeHash, and Store. Rewired all three modules plus the migrate task's ad hoc git rm --cached call onto Git.run/Git.temp_path, preserving every temp-filename convention and error shape exactly (e.g. store.ex's evidence-blob-*.json suffix) so no caller-visible behavior changed.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 07261362-0355-433e-83a4-d8c98524294e
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-dev-cs-specled/07261362-0355-433e-83a4-d8c98524294e.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 6 (.spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md, lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.migrate.ex, lib/specled_ex/evidence/git.ex [new], store.ex, sync.ex, tree_hash.ex)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: implementer flipped 0 (all evidence_store.spec.md verification stubs were already execute: true); I re-ran both command stubs + the tagged_tests stubs anyway.
- Requirements coverage (contract-level, this ticket = pure consolidation):
  - ONE shared git-helper module: SpecLedEx.Evidence.Git created; Git.run/temp_path/random_hex are the sole plumbing. Covered by all 17 evidence+task tests (real-git integration, no mocks). Would fail if Git.run built different subprocess args — every git op now routes through it against real tmp repos. Seams: none (no Mock/Memory/fake/stub/Mox/meck anywhere in the evidence or task test surface).
  - Sync/TreeHash/Store/migrate all rewired onto Git: grep confirms 0 direct System.cmd("git") remain in the 4 files; 30 Git.run/temp_path call sites. Covered by sync_test (tree-union via fetch/push/ls-tree/cat-file), store_test (self_create/run_stamp/CAS via commit-tree/update-ref/write-tree), tree_hash_test (add -A mirror via read-tree/write-tree). Would fail on any arg drift.
  - Zero caller-visible behavior change: temp-filename conventions preserved exactly — evidence-index-, evidence-blob-...json (via path <> ".json"), sync-index-, sync-entry.json-, index-. Error shape {:error,{:git,args,output,status}} preserved (args still exclude -C root, so store.ex's ["update-ref"|_] match still fires). migrate.ex env: [] == old inherited env (empty list merges nothing). No difference.
  - No leftover duplicated helper variants: grep for defp git/git_path/temp_path/temp_index_path/random_hex across the 4 files finds only store.ex temp_blob_path — a thin .json-suffix adapter over Git.temp_path, not a duplicated plumbing helper. All git/3, git_path, random_hex, temp_index_path, sync's temp_path removed.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. Diff contains no F2 (sync short-circuit/prune), F5 (temp-index cleanup — File.rm sites unchanged), or F6 (entry tolerance — Entry untouched) behavior change. Pure move + rewire.
- Targeted verification: PASS. mix compile --warnings-as-errors (clean); mix test on tree_hash/store/sync + spec_evidence_migrate/spec_sync_task/spec_prune_task/spec_evidence_install_hook (17 tests, 0 failures); mix test ... --only spec (11 spec-tagged tests, 0 failures, proves rewired plumbing executes); mix format --check-formatted (clean); mix deps.unlock --check-unused (clean).
- Full-suite verification: not run by verifier (by design)
- Audit-expanded scope (step 11): none — no AUDIT:/BOUNCE comment on this ticket.

Verdict: PASS

Notes:
- Git.random_hex/1 is public but has no external consumer (used only inside Git.temp_path). Harmless — it is part of the documented shared surface and is exercised via temp_path. Advisory only; does not change the verdict.
- migrate.ex untrack_state_json collapses {:ok,_}/{:error,_} both to :ok, matching the old {_,0}/{_,_} both-to-:ok behavior. Intentional and preserved.

AUDIT: APPROVE (auto — selective audit)
Session: 07261362-0355-433e-83a4-d8c98524294e
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/07261362-0355-433e-83a4-d8c98524294e.jsonl

Reasoning: VERIFY reported PASS with full stub and requirement coverage, zero
scope violations, passing targeted verification, complete seam disclosure, and
no seam substituting production wiring. No auditor was spawned per policy.
APPROVED. Merged into specled_-csg/evidence-ledger-split. Closing per orchestrator sign-off.

title: review-F4: git plumbing helpers duplicated across 4 evidence modules, already drifted
